baba.homeTitle: Studio-built infrastructure for premium geo discovery

baba.cards.privacyText: Age, consent, reporting, removal, and GDPR-oriented foundations for a serious 18+ platform.

accountType.privateDescription: A private account is intended for one individual advertiser. One phone number may only be assigned to the same person. Multiple phone numbers are allowed, but they must belong to the same individual. If several people advertise under one phone number, choose Agency, Massage Salon, or Club/Party.
phone.privateWarning: One phone number cannot lead to listings for multiple different people on a private account. Choose Agency, Massage Salon, or Club/Party for multi-person operations.
phone.confirmSameOwner: I confirm that the phone numbers belong to the same individual advertiser.

install.title: Install App
install.copy: Use Escort Radar like a mobile app with faster access to radar, messages, favorites and your account.
install.androidPrompt: Open this page in Chrome and use the browser install prompt when it appears.
install.iosPrompt: In Safari, tap Share, then choose Add to Home Screen.
install.desktopPrompt: Use your browser menu or address bar install icon to add Escort Radar to your device.
install.installed: Escort Radar is installed on this device.
install.benefit.radarText: Open city radar without typing the address again.
install.benefit.messagesText: Return to conversations with less friction.
install.benefit.favoritesText: Keep saved profiles close from the home screen.
install.benefit.fastText: Launch in a standalone app-like window.
install.benefit.accountText: Reach dashboard tools quickly after login.
install.iosStep3: Choose Add to Home Screen and confirm.
install.androidStep2: Tap Install App when the prompt is available.
install.androidStep3: If no prompt appears, use Chrome menu, then Add to Home screen.
install.desktopStep1: Open Escort Radar in Chrome, Edge or another PWA-capable browser.
install.desktopStep2: Use the install icon in the address bar or browser menu.
install.desktopStep3: Launch Escort Radar from your desktop or app launcher.
legal.copy1: This page is a professional placeholder for a legal 18+ marketplace. Final text must be reviewed by a qualified lawyer before publication.
legal.copy2: Production policy must cover age verification, consent, prohibited content, exploitation prevention, takedown requests, GDPR rights, and moderation.
legal.technologyCopy1: Escort Radar is developed and maintained by BABA AI.
legal.technologyCopy2: All software, infrastructure, UI systems, and marketplace technology are proprietary intellectual property of BABA AI.
legal.technologyCopy3: Unauthorized copying or redistribution is prohibited.
